name: ALASKA AIR GROUP, INC.
summary: Alaska Air Group, Inc. is a Delaware corporation operating Alaska Airlines, Hawaiian Airlines, and Horizon Air. It provides scheduled passenger and cargo air transportation across North America, Latin America, Asia, and the Pacific, using Boeing and Airbus aircraft. The company also operates a cargo business including freighter aircraft, a loyalty program called Atmos Rewards, co-branded credit cards, and aviation services through subsidiary McGee Air Services.
